Good morning.
Christ is King 👑

SecState Rubio: “Radical Islam has shown that their desire is not simply to occupy one part of the world… It seeks to expand and control more territories and more people… radical Islam has designs, openly, on the West, on the United States, on Europe.”

Video

End the zombie filibuster and pass the SAVE America Act


Mike Lee (@BasedMikeLee)

After two years of preparation, the Senate will begin debating the SAVE America Act tomorrow

Once we’re on this bill, we must stay on it until it’s passed into law 

Filibustering senators must be required to speak—no Zombie Filibusters here

Get it done

Pass it on

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BasedMikeLee/status/2033690203395961297#m

Rep. Hakeem Jeffries (D-NY) on the SAVE America Act: “The United States Constitution also makes clear that only citizens can vote.”

Then why are congressional Democrats opposed to this bill that provides mechanisms to ensure only citizens vote?

Video

Gavin Newsom said he’s like his black audience because he got low SAT scores.

Video

President Trump on Gavin Newsom: “Everything about him is dumb.”

Newsom even recently implied that a black audience he was talking to was dumb.

That’s really dumb—and racist.

Video

Stunning and brave.

Woke Hollywood actress DEMANDS Trump end the war that Trump ended 6 months ago…

So now will she say ‘thank you?’

Video

“Gavin Newscum has admitted that he has learning disabilities. I’m all for people with learning disabilities but not for my President… Everything about him is dumb… he looked at the audience and said I’m smarter than you and now… they call him a racist, because it was a black audience.”

Video

Video

Reporter: “NOTUS.”

Trump: “I don’t even know who the hell that is… you better get yourself a real job.”
